codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the root cause: in Python, simplify_styles is called on the <body> element itself (line 1404 of yj_to_epub_properties.py), so reverse inheritance at line 1949 (`sty.update(new_heritable_sty, replace=True)`) directly promotes common child properties like font-style/font-weight into the body's style map. In Go, the body is split into BodyStyle (CSS class string) and Root (htmlElement wrapper). When simplifyStylesElementFull runs on Root, reverse inheritance promotes font-style:italic and font-weight:bold into Root's style attrs, but BodyStyle never sees them. The fix adds a post-simplify merge step that copies heritable properties from Root's style into bodyStyle, using the heritableProperties map as a filter. The merge is correctly gated: it only sets a property on bodyStyle if it's currently empty or only set to the heritable default value, preventing overwriting of intentional body-level properties. This is a minimal, well-targeted fix that correctly parallels Python's behavior. Build succeeds, test suite maintains baseline (10 FAIL), and HG diffs reduced from 47 to 45 as expected.

issues.description: allowsReverseInheritance() is defined (line 1063) but never called anywhere in the codebase. The function always returns false, and the reverse inheritance logic in simplifyStylesElementFull and applyReverseInheritance does not use it. This is dead code that could be removed or connected. Not related to this fix but observed during review.

summary: PASS. The fix correctly addresses HG .class_s2T missing font-style:italic and font-weight:bold. The root cause was identified accurately: Python calls simplify_styles on the body element directly, so reverse inheritance naturally promotes child properties to the body style. Go splits body into BodyStyle + Root, so reverse-inherited properties only reached Root. The fix adds a minimal merge step that copies heritable properties from Root's style into BodyStyle after simplifyStylesElementFull runs. The merge is properly filtered (only heritable properties, only when bodyStyle is empty or default). HG diffs reduced from 47 to 45, no regressions on other test files, 10 baseline test failures unchanged.
